headline: FT Alphaville is (also) on Substack
body_text:
FT Alphaville has a Substack. As we previously explained:

Our newsletter sweeps FTAV stuff together each Friday, augmented with the best content we’ve seen elsewhere. We’ll also include a selection of killer charts cribbed from around the FT over the past week. Bryce is anchoring, for his sins. What more could you want, really?

Just like FTAV itself, the newsletter is free. All you have to do is sign up, which you can do from our Substack index page. Or via this:

Further reading:— Hello world. We’re FT Alphaville
